cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top 5 numbers are selected from the highest scoring candidates in the shortlist, matching frequent digits per position and avoiding duplicates. The top 50 list extends this selection maintaining high scores and alignment with frequent digit patterns observed in recent draws, ensuring a strong and diverse candidate set.
